full_address: Doicesti SMR site, Dambovita County, Romania
build_phase_if_known: Phase II of Black Sea AI Gigafactory; follows Cernavoda Phase I
cooling_type: Hybrid cooling; SMR co-location; integration with national high-speed network
opportunity_summary: Phase II of Romania's Black Sea AI Gigafactory at Doicesti, the site of Romania's planned first SMR (Small Modular Reactor). AI accelerators deployed here after Cernavoda Phase I. SMR co-location offers potential for hybrid cooling and heat exchange. Part of EU InvestAI initiative. Could become EU's first SMR-powered AI facility.
confidence_reason: Romania Insider, DATACENTER FORUM 2026 confirm Doicesti Phase II, SMR co-location. Early stage bidding, lower confidence.
